prices_text: Price list • French — 100 zł • Square — 50 zł Prices are examples — change them to real ones.
portfolio_text: You can see more works on Instagram:
subscription_required: To make a booking, please subscribe to the channel first.
still_not_subscribed: You are not subscribed yet. Please subscribe and then press “I am subscribed”.
subscription_ok: Thank you! You can now make a booking.
booking_start_title: 📅 Choose a day for your visit (next 30 days):
no_available_days: Unfortunately, there are no available days for booking now. Please try again later.
booking_choose_time: ⏰ You chose {date}. Please choose a time:
no_available_times: There are no available time slots for this day. Choose another date.
booking_enter_name: Please enter your name (as it should appear in the booking).
booking_enter_phone: Please enter your phone number (with country code).
booking_confirmed: ✅ Your booking is confirmed! Date: {date} Time: {time} Name: {name} Phone: {phone}
booking_already_exists: You already have an active booking: Date: {date} Time: {time} You can only have one active booking.
booking_slot_unavailable: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose another time or date.
admin_only: This command is only available to the administrator.
admin_day_closed: Day {date} is now closed for new bookings.
admin_cancel_pick_booking: Choose a booking to cancel for {date}:
admin_cancel_no_bookings: No bookings to cancel for this date.
reminder_text: ⏰ Reminder: you have an appointment tomorrow! Date: {date} Time: {time}
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
error_invalid_name: Please enter a valid name (minimum 2 characters).
error_invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number (minimum 7 digits).
admin_cancel_success_custom: ✅ You canceled the booking for {name} on {date} at {time}
confirm_booking_title: Check your details: 📅 Date: {date} ⏰ Time: {time} 👤 Name: {name} 📞 Phone: {phone} Is this correct?
